calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2007 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-21-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-17-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Vicki Gross.
Atty. Caroly Morris Esq., appearing for the Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank.
Order waiving live testimony was filed on August 7, 2006.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant VLADIMIR VOLOSNIKOV aka VLADIMIR V. VOLOSKINOV AKA VLADIMIR V. VOLOSNIKOV JR. as follows:
Principal $ 25,042.12
Prejudgment Interest $ 4,790.77
Attorney's Fees $1,274.00
Costs $470.00 for a total of $31,576.89.
Judgment and Order Allowing Several Judgment signed in open court.
As to Defendant ENTERTO INC., a conditional dismissal was submitted on July 28, 2006 and settled. Last payment is to be made on March 2007. MATTER IS CONTINUED TO CAL 225 OSC CALENDAR FOR DEPT. 212 ON APRIL 17, 2006 AT 10:00 A.M.

Osc (Cal Rules Of Court 225) As To Defendant Enterto Inc.
Off Calendar Aug-17-2006 Continued To Apr-17-07 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-13-2006 Continued To Sep-01-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-30-2006 Off Calendar
